businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader - a three-pillar system of Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for governments and enterprises. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56% YoY), Q4 revenue $1.41B (+70% YoY, all-time record). Adjusted operating margin 32%. Monday close $152.72 (+1.17%). Unveiled sovereign AI OS with NVIDIA at AIPCon 9 (3/12). President Aki Jain spoke at GTC. Entered sports betting AI monitoring with Polymarket.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts (Gotham - defense and intelligence agency data analytics)
Enterprise AI platform (Foundry - industrial data analytics)
AIP Boot Camps (5-day intensive pilots converting to enterprise-wide deployments)
keyProducts: Gotham - mission-critical analytics for defense and intelligence
Foundry - enterprise data integration and analytics
Sovereign AI Data Center OS - co-architecture with NVIDIA

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 9x the S&P 500 average (27x), 5.4x the software sector average (45x). Extremely high premium vs. sector median Forward P/E of 21.3x. However, comparable to peers like Datadog (290x) while CrowdStrike remains unprofitable

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5.5x the S&P 500 Forward P/E (21x). 5.4x the sector median (21.3x). GuruFocus GF Value of $58.93 indicates significantly overvalued

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 $4.48B. Q4 $1.41B (+70% YoY, all-time record). FY2026 guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%). U.S. commercial revenue exploded +137%

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Among the highest margins in SaaS. Q4 GAAP net income hit $609M record

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF margin 47%. Exceptional cash conversion rate

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Gradual uptick from $1B contract, AIPCon 9, and GTC catalysts

growthDrivers.title: Sovereign AI OS unveiled at AIPCon 9, targeting global AI infrastructure market
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/16): Palantir and NVIDIA unveiled a 'Sovereign AI OS Reference Architecture' at AIPCon 9 on March 12. Targeting the ~$600B market for governments building their own AI data centers. U.S. Navy, SAP, Accenture participated.

growthDrivers.title: $1 billion defense AI contract secured, government revenue acceleration
growthDrivers.description: Motley Fool (3/16): Palantir secured a $1B defense AI contract. With the Iran war escalating defense AI spending, Palantir emerges as the primary beneficiary.

growthDrivers.title: President speaks at GTC, deepening NVIDIA NemoClaw partnership
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA Blog (3/16): Palantir president Aki Jain spoke at the GTC accelerated computing session. NemoClaw (agent development tools) announcement strengthens the sovereign AI OS strategic position.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket sports betting AI monitoring entry, new revenue stream
growthDrivers.description: The Block (3/10): Polymarket partnered with Palantir and TWG AI to build a sports betting integrity platform powered by the Vergence AI engine. Pioneering prediction market monitoring as a new vertical.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of track record in government and defense AI. Security clearances create an impenetrable entry barrier. NVIDIA sovereign AI + NemoClaw partnership secures a core position in the AI agent ecosystem.

moats.description: Highest-level security clearances with U.S. DoD and intelligence agencies. Competitors cannot replicate.
Sovereign AI OS + NVIDIA hardware + NemoClaw agent ecosystem. Triple-layered partnership.
5-day intensive pilots that convert to enterprise-wide deployments. High conversion rate from try to buy.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General-purpose approach vs. Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Expanding into analytics platform territory

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Lags Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: Palantir president speaks at GTC + NVIDIA NemoClaw launch confirms AI agent ecosystem leadership
recentNews.significance: President-level keynote at NVIDIA's flagship event. NemoClaw announcement enhances sovereign AI OS capabilities

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: Palantir wins $1B defense AI contract. Iran war could explode government AI spending
recentNews.significance: Single contract worth $1B. Escalating Iran war driving defense budget surge, positioning Palantir as top beneficiary

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9: Sovereign AI OS reference architecture unveiled with NVIDIA; U.S. Navy, SAP, Accenture participate
recentNews.significance: 9th AIPCon showcased turnkey solutions for government AI data centers. Dell collaboration also expanded

recentNews.headline: Polymarket partners with Palantir and TWG AI to build sports betting integrity platform using Vergence AI engine
recentNews.significance: Entry into a completely new vertical of prediction market monitoring. Proves AI platform versatility

recentNews.headline: BNP Paribas increases Palantir holdings by 17.6%. Institutional buying continues
recentNews.significance: Institutions expanding positions despite valuation concerns. Betting on long-term growth

analystOpinions.notableComment: 16 out of 28 analysts rate Buy. Consensus $192.68 (+26%). Post AIPCon 9 + GTC + $1B contract, target price upgrades likely. TipRanks notes bearish case citing extreme valuation despite 460% 5-year gain.

risks.title: Extreme valuation: P/E 242x, Forward P/E 116x
risks.description: 5.4x the sector median Forward P/E of 21.3x. GuruFocus GF Value $58.93 flags significant overvaluation. Multiple compression risk if growth decelerates.

risks.title: 2026 YTD -14%, down 26% from 52-week high
risks.description: Significantly underperforming S&P 500's -2.2%. Direct victim of AI bubble fears and high-valuation stock selloff.

risks.title: Iran war escalation: a double-edged sword
risks.description: Catalyst for surging defense AI demand, but geopolitical uncertainty pressures broader markets. Defense premium evaporates if conflict de-escalates.

risks.title: Share dilution: +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Stock-based compensation driving nearly 5% annual dilution. Long-term shareholder value erosion.

risks.title: Big Tech AI platform competition intensifying
risks.description: Microsoft, Google, and Amazon ramping up enterprise AI platforms. Could slow commercial revenue growth.

buyReasons.title: Triple catalyst in one week: AIPCon 9 + GTC + $1B defense contract
buyReasons.rationale: Sovereign AI OS unveiled at AIPCon 9 (3/12), president speaks at GTC (3/16), $1B defense contract secured (3/15). Three major events in one week reinforce the growth narrative.

buyReasons.title: Q4 revenue +70% YoY, U.S. commercial +137% explosive growth
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 revenue $1.41B, all-time high. TCV $4.26B (+138%). FY2026 guidance $7.2B (+61%). U.S. revenue at 77% of total provides stable revenue structure.

buyReasons.title: Polymarket sports betting AI monitoring opens new market
buyReasons.rationale: Vergence AI engine-based prediction market integrity monitoring. TAM expansion beyond government and enterprise into fintech and prediction markets.

buyReasons.title: FCF margin 47% + debt-free, fortress balance sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M. FCF margin 47% provides ample self-funded growth capacity.

overallOpinion: Palantir unveiled a sovereign AI OS with NVIDIA at AIPCon 9, and in the same week landed a $1B defense contract and had its president speak at GTC. The Polymarket sports betting AI partnership opens an entirely new market beyond government and enterprise.

Q4 revenue hit an all-time high of $1.41B (+70%), with U.S. commercial revenue exploding +137%. FY2026 guidance of $7.2B (+61%) crushed consensus expectations. Institutions keep buying (BNP Paribas +17.6%).
However, the P/E of 242x and YTD -14% mean the valuation premium remains a real burden. The stock has bounced 16% in the past month but is still 26% below the 52-week high of $208.
Closed at $152.72, just below the 50-day SMA ($154) attempting a breakout. Consensus target $193 (+26%). RSI at 56, neither overbought nor oversold.

investmentVerdict.summary: The triple catalyst of AIPCon 9, GTC, and the $1B defense contract strengthens the growth narrative. Q4 revenue +70% and guidance of +61% partially justify the 242x P/E, but with a premium exceeding 5x the sector median, dollar-cost averaging is the prudent approach.

empathy.hook: PLTR holders, the 26% drawdown has been rough but the tide may be turning
empathy.text:
$PLTR (3/17) $152.72 (+1.17%)

From $208 to $152. Not easy. YTD -14%, way worse than the S&P. But this week feels different.

AIPCon 9 sovereign AI OS with NVIDIA, GTC president speech, $1B defense deal. Q4 revenue +70% all-time high, guidance +61%. Institutions are accumulating.

Testing the 50-day SMA ($154). Up 16% over the past month. Consensus $193 (+26%). Take it slow. Dollar-cost averaging is the right call here.
